posts.author: Benjo (Ben Johnston)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! I’m Ben from the monday.com product team! I’m working with our integration partners and would love to hear from you about how you communicate with your co-workers.

Please feel free to comment below, we’d love to hear your thoughts!

  • Slack
  • Microsoft Teams
  • Google Chat
  • WhatsApp
  • Zoom Chat
  • Other
0 voters
